module.name: Investigation
module.description: Comprehensive training on investigative techniques across multiple disciplines.

investigation_criminal_profiling.name: Criminal Profiling
investigation_criminal_profiling.description: Training in psychological profiling, behavioral analysis, and offender pattern recognition.

investigation_cybercrime_analysis.name: Cybercrime Analysis
investigation_cybercrime_analysis.description: Training in cyber threat investigations, hacking methodologies, and online fraud detection.

investigation_digital_forensics.name: Digital Forensics
investigation_digital_forensics.description: Techniques for recovering and analyzing digital evidence from computers, networks, and mobile devices.

investigation_financial_crimes.name: Financial Crimes
investigation_financial_crimes.description: Training in fraud detection, forensic accounting, and money laundering investigations.

investigation_forensic_investigation.name: Forensic Investigation
investigation_forensic_investigation.description: Techniques for crime scene analysis, evidence handling, and forensic science applications.

investigation_homicide_investigation.name: Homicide Investigation
investigation_homicide_investigation.description: Training in murder investigations, crime scene analysis, and suspect interrogation techniques.

investigation_criminal_profiling_behavio.name: Behavioral Profiling Methods
investigation_criminal_profiling_behavio.description: Techniques for analyzing human behavior to predict and profile criminal activity.

cards.title: Criminal Behavior Patterns
cards.description: Identifying recurring behavioral traits in criminals based on case studies.
bulletpoints: Analyze repeated offense patterns
Identify triggers and escalation markers
Use psychological models to predict future actions
cards.summaryText: Study recurring behaviors and triggers to forecast an offender’s next moves.

cards.title: Lie Detection and Deceptive Behavior
cards.description: Detecting deception through verbal and non-verbal cues.
bulletpoints: Analyze microexpressions and body language
Assess inconsistencies in suspect statements
Apply forensic interview techniques to detect dishonesty
cards.summaryText: Blend verbal cues and microexpressions to spot deception during interviews.

investigation_criminal_profiling_offende.name: Offender Typologies
investigation_criminal_profiling_offende.description: Categorizing offenders based on psychological, social, and criminal factors.

cards.title: Organized vs. Disorganized Offenders
cards.description: Understanding distinctions between methodical and chaotic criminal behavior.
bulletpoints: Identify crime scene traits linked to offender organization level
Analyze post-crime behavior and forensic evidence
Profile offenders based on control vs. impulsiveness
cards.summaryText: Contrast organized versus disorganized patterns to narrow behavioral signatures.

cards.title: Psychopathy and Sociopathy in Criminals
cards.description: Profiling offenders based on psychopathic and sociopathic tendencies.
bulletpoints: Assess lack of empathy, remorse, and manipulative tendencies
Identify risk levels for recidivism
Differentiate between psychopathy and sociopathy in offenders
cards.summaryText: Gauge psychopathic traits to estimate recidivism risk and tailor intervention.

investigation_criminal_profiling_threat_.name: Threat Assessment
investigation_criminal_profiling_threat_.description: Evaluating individuals and situations to assess potential criminal threats.

cards.title: Violence Risk Assessment
cards.description: Analyzing behavioral and environmental factors that contribute to violent crime.
bulletpoints: Use threat matrices to classify individuals by risk level
Evaluate escalation indicators and stressors
Employ forensic psychology tools for predicting violent tendencies
cards.summaryText: Blend matrices and behavioral cues to grade violence risk and intervene early.

cards.title: Geographic Profiling in Criminal Investigations
cards.description: Using location-based data to identify offender movement patterns.
bulletpoints: Map crime scene locations to predict future activity
Analyze buffer zones and offender hunting patterns
Use GIS tools to narrow down suspect residency areas
cards.summaryText: Leverage geographic profiling to trace offender movement and pinpoint likely bases.

investigation_cybercrime_analysis_cyber_.name: Cyber Fraud Detection
investigation_cybercrime_analysis_cyber_.description: Techniques for detecting and preventing online fraud and financial cybercrimes.

cards.title: Identity Theft Investigation
cards.description: Tracking and dismantling digital identity fraud schemes.
bulletpoints: Analyze phishing tactics used in identity theft
Use OSINT tools to trace fraudulent accounts and transactions
Deploy behavioral biometrics to detect unauthorized access
cards.summaryText: Trace phishing vectors and biometrics trails to expose digital identity theft rings.

cards.title: Payment Fraud Analysis & Detection
cards.description: Identifying fraudulent financial transactions across online platforms.
bulletpoints: Use AI and machine learning to detect abnormal payment patterns
Investigate money laundering techniques in cryptocurrency transactions
Analyze credit card fraud and digital payment fraud trends
cards.summaryText: Leverage AI and crypto forensics to flag anomalous payment and laundering activity.

investigation_cybercrime_analysis_dark_w.name: Dark Web Investigations
investigation_cybercrime_analysis_dark_w.description: Techniques for tracking illegal activities on hidden networks and marketplaces.

cards.title: TOR Network Tracking & OSINT
cards.description: Using open-source intelligence (OSINT) to monitor illegal activities on TOR.
bulletpoints: Identify common TOR marketplaces for illicit activities
Use blockchain analysis to track cryptocurrency transactions
Deploy darknet crawlers to index and map hidden services
cards.summaryText: Track TOR markets with OSINT, crawlers, and crypto traces to map illicit activity.

cards.title: Darknet Investigation Methods
cards.description: Covertly gathering intelligence from forums, vendors, and communication channels.
bulletpoints: Establish undercover identities and maintain operational security
Extract intelligence from forum conversations and vendor reviews
Trace illegal digital goods, cyberweapons, and stolen data
cards.summaryText: Run covert personas through forums to collect intel and trace illicit digital goods.

investigation_cybercrime_analysis_malwar.name: Malware Analysis
investigation_cybercrime_analysis_malwar.description: Investigating malicious software, exploit kits, and advanced persistent threats (APTs).

cards.title: Reverse Engineering Malware
cards.description: Analyzing malware behavior, obfuscation techniques, and payloads.
bulletpoints: Disassemble and debug malware using IDA Pro and Ghidra
Analyze execution flow and identify persistence mechanisms
Detect obfuscation techniques used in modern malware
cards.summaryText: Dissect binaries to unravel malware flow, persistence, and obfuscation tricks.

cards.title: Ransomware Analysis & Mitigation
cards.description: Understanding ransomware encryption and devising countermeasures.
bulletpoints: Analyze encryption algorithms used in ransomware strains
Identify and isolate command-and-control (C2) servers
Develop decryption tools and sandbox environments for mitigation
cards.summaryText: Interrogate ransomware crypto and C2 chains to craft containment and recovery playbooks.

investigation_digital_forensics_computer.name: Computer Forensic Methods
investigation_digital_forensics_computer.description: Techniques for analyzing and recovering digital evidence from computers and storage devices.

cards.title: Disk Imaging and Evidence Preservation
cards.description: Creating forensic copies of digital storage devices while preserving integrity.
bulletpoints: Use tools like FTK Imager and dd for disk imaging
Ensure write-blocking to maintain evidence integrity
Verify hash values to confirm forensic accuracy
cards.summaryText: Image storage with write-blocking and hashes to preserve pristine evidence copies.

cards.title: Deleted File Recovery and Metadata Analysis
cards.description: Recovering deleted files and analyzing metadata for investigative leads.
bulletpoints: Use data carving techniques to extract lost information
Analyze file timestamps and access logs for forensic reconstruction
Identify hidden partitions and encrypted file containers
cards.summaryText: Combine carving and metadata analysis to resurrect deleted artifacts and context.

investigation_digital_forensics_mobile_d.name: Mobile Device Exploitation
investigation_digital_forensics_mobile_d.description: Forensic methods for extracting and analyzing data from mobile devices.

cards.title: Smartphone Data Extraction and Analysis
cards.description: Extracting call logs, messages, and geolocation data from mobile devices.
bulletpoints: Use forensic tools like Cellebrite and MOBILedit
Recover deleted SMS, call history, and multimedia files
Analyze geolocation metadata from GPS logs
cards.summaryText: Leverage mobile forensic suites to extract communications and geo trails from devices.

cards.title: Mobile Malware Analysis
cards.description: Identifying and analyzing malicious software on mobile devices.
bulletpoints: Use dynamic and static analysis to detect malware infections
Analyze Android and iOS app permissions for suspicious behavior
Identify spyware and unauthorized remote access tools
cards.summaryText: Dissect mobile apps and behaviors to uncover spyware and malicious implants.

investigation_digital_forensics_network_.name: Network Packet Analysis
investigation_digital_forensics_network_.description: Capturing and analyzing network traffic for forensic investigations.

cards.title: Packet Capture and Traffic Analysis
cards.description: Using network monitoring tools to analyze suspicious activity.
bulletpoints: Capture and inspect packets using Wireshark and tcpdump
Identify malicious payloads in network traffic
Analyze protocol anomalies and encrypted communications
cards.summaryText: Capture packets with Wireshark and tcpdump to spot malicious payloads and anomalies.

cards.title: Intrusion Detection and Threat Hunting
cards.description: Detecting and analyzing cyber threats through network activity.
bulletpoints: Use Snort and Suricata to detect network intrusions
Analyze DNS tunneling and covert communication channels
Correlate network logs with endpoint forensic data
cards.summaryText: Deploy IDS tooling and threat hunting to expose covert channels and tie to host evidence.

investigation_financial_crimes_financial.name: Financial Statement Analysis
investigation_financial_crimes_financial.description: Examining corporate financial records for fraud, misrepresentation, and tax evasion.

cards.title: Forensic Auditing and Red Flag Indicators
cards.description: Identifying signs of fraud within corporate financial statements.
bulletpoints: Analyze inconsistencies in balance sheets and income statements
Identify shell companies and fraudulent bookkeeping practices
Use forensic tools to cross-reference financial transactions
cards.summaryText: Scrutinize ledgers and shells to flag abnormalities in corporate financials.

cards.title: Tax Evasion and Financial Misconduct
cards.description: Investigating illegal tax avoidance schemes and fraudulent financial reporting.
bulletpoints: Track offshore accounts used for tax evasion
Analyze false deductions and fraudulent tax returns
Collaborate with international agencies for financial compliance
cards.summaryText: Trace offshore flows and bogus filings to dismantle tax evasion schemes.

investigation_financial_crimes_fraud_det.name: Fraud Detection Techniques
investigation_financial_crimes_fraud_det.description: Methods for identifying, analyzing, and preventing financial fraud.

cards.title: Credit Card Fraud Detection
cards.description: Identifying fraudulent credit card transactions and behavioral anomalies.
bulletpoints: Analyze spending patterns for unauthorized activity
Use AI and machine learning models for fraud detection
Investigate cloned and stolen credit card fraud cases
cards.summaryText: Model transaction patterns to spotlight unauthorized card use fast.

cards.title: Phishing and Online Fraud Investigations
cards.description: Tracking and mitigating fraudulent email and social engineering attacks.
bulletpoints: Recognize phishing tactics in emails and fake websites
Trace fraudulent accounts used for identity theft
Investigate cybercriminal networks behind phishing schemes
cards.summaryText: Track phishing infrastructure to dismantle social engineering campaigns.

investigation_financial_crimes_money_lau.name: Money Laundering Patterns
investigation_financial_crimes_money_lau.description: Techniques used to track and prevent the illegal movement of funds.

cards.title: Structuring and Smurfing Detection
cards.description: Identifying small, structured transactions used to launder money.
bulletpoints: Monitor cash deposits below reporting thresholds
Identify multiple accounts linked to the same entity
Analyze transaction frequency and timing for laundering indicators
cards.summaryText: Spot structuring through sub-threshold deposits and coordinated account activity.

cards.title: Cryptocurrency Money Laundering
cards.description: Investigating illicit financial activity within blockchain transactions.
bulletpoints: Track cryptocurrency wallets linked to illicit activities
Analyze blockchain transactions for laundering patterns
Use forensic tools to trace funds across multiple exchanges
cards.summaryText: Follow crypto wallet flows across chains to expose laundering routes.

investigation_forensic_investigation_cri.name: Crime Scene Processing
investigation_forensic_investigation_cri.description: Techniques for properly securing, documenting, and analyzing crime scenes.

cards.title: Scene Preservation & Contamination Control
cards.description: Ensuring a crime scene remains uncontaminated and all evidence is preserved.
bulletpoints: Establish and secure crime scene perimeters
Use proper PPE and contamination control procedures
Document scene layout, environmental factors, and evidence placement
cards.summaryText: Lock down the scene and document conditions to preserve uncontaminated evidence.

cards.title: Evidence Tagging and Documentation
cards.description: Properly labeling, collecting, and logging evidence for forensic analysis.
bulletpoints: Use chain of custody protocols for legal integrity
Tag evidence using barcode systems and logs
Take high-quality photos and sketches of all critical elements
cards.summaryText: Label and log evidence meticulously so chain-of-custody stands up in court.

investigation_forensic_investigation_dna.name: DNA and Fingerprint Analysis
investigation_forensic_investigation_dna.description: Methods for extracting and analyzing biological evidence and latent fingerprints.

cards.title: DNA Extraction & Profiling
cards.description: Collecting and analyzing biological samples for forensic investigations.
bulletpoints: Use sterile collection techniques for blood, hair, and bodily fluids
Apply PCR and STR analysis for DNA matching
Interpret CODIS database results to identify suspects
cards.summaryText: Collect pristine samples and run STR profiling to match DNA via CODIS.

cards.title: Latent Fingerprint Analysis & Matching
cards.description: Recovering and analyzing fingerprints from crime scenes.
bulletpoints: Use dusting, cyanoacrylate fuming, and chemical methods for print recovery
Compare fingerprint ridge patterns using AFIS databases
Differentiate between class, loop, arch, and whorl fingerprint types
cards.summaryText: Develop latent prints and compare ridge patterns in AFIS to confirm identities.

investigation_forensic_investigation_for.name: Forensic Lab Procedures
investigation_forensic_investigation_for.description: Lab-based techniques for processing and analyzing forensic evidence.

cards.title: Microscopic Trace Analysis
cards.description: Examining trace evidence such as fibers, hair, and gunshot residue.
bulletpoints: Use microscopes to identify fiber and hair characteristics
Analyze glass and paint fragments for source determination
Test for gunshot residue on suspects and clothing
cards.summaryText: Inspect trace evidence microscopically to tie fibers, residue, and fragments to sources.

cards.title: Forensic Toxicology & Drug Screening
cards.description: Testing biological samples for toxins, drugs, and poisons.
bulletpoints: Use GC-MS and LC-MS techniques to detect drug metabolites
Analyze blood alcohol levels and poisoning indicators
Correlate toxicology findings with cause of death analysis
cards.summaryText: Run GC/LC-MS panels to link toxicology results with cause-of-death narratives.

investigation_homicide_investigation_cau.name: Cause of Death Forensics
investigation_homicide_investigation_cau.description: Examining forensic evidence to determine cause, manner, and time of death.

cards.title: Autopsy Procedures & Forensic Pathology
cards.description: Step-by-step analysis of human remains to determine cause of death.
bulletpoints: Perform external and internal examinations on remains
Analyze organ damage, wound patterns, and trauma indicators
Document findings for use in legal proceedings
cards.summaryText: Conduct full autopsies to map trauma, document evidence, and nail down cause of death.

cards.title: Toxicology Reports & Poisoning Investigations
cards.description: Identifying toxins, drugs, and other substances in homicide investigations.
bulletpoints: Use forensic chemistry to detect poisons and overdose substances
Analyze blood and tissue samples for chemical traces
Correlate toxicology findings with cause and manner of death
cards.summaryText: Run toxicology on fluids and tissues to tie chemical agents to the fatal outcome.

investigation_homicide_investigation_hom.name: Homicide Case Studies
investigation_homicide_investigation_hom.description: Analyzing real-life homicide cases to understand patterns and investigative approaches.

cards.title: Serial Killer Profiles & Pattern Analysis
cards.description: Examining patterns in serial homicides to predict offender behavior.
bulletpoints: Identify common psychological and behavioral traits of serial killers
Analyze modus operandi and signature behaviors
Compare historical serial cases to active investigations
cards.summaryText: Synthesize serial killer patterns to forecast moves and tighten suspect pools.

cards.title: Cold Case Reviews & Modern Forensic Techniques
cards.description: Re-examining unsolved cases using updated forensic methods.
bulletpoints: Utilize new forensic DNA analysis and database cross-referencing
Reconstruct timelines and suspect profiles using modern OSINT tools
Identify common factors leading to case resolution after extended periods
cards.summaryText: Reopen cold cases with fresh forensics and OSINT to surface breakthrough leads.

investigation_homicide_investigation_sus.name: Suspect Interview Methods
investigation_homicide_investigation_sus.description: Techniques for interrogating suspects to extract reliable and legally admissible confessions.

cards.title: Reid Technique & Psychological Pressure
cards.description: Applying structured interrogation tactics to elicit truthful statements.
bulletpoints: Use step-by-step persuasive questioning methods
Analyze suspect body language and microexpressions
Differentiate between truthful responses and deceptive tactics
cards.summaryText: Guide structured interrogations that read cues and pressure out truthful accounts.

cards.title: Cognitive Interviewing for Witnesses & Suspects
cards.description: Enhancing memory recall and extracting key details from subjects.
bulletpoints: Use visualization and recall techniques to reconstruct crime events
Minimize leading questions to maintain accuracy
Adapt interview strategies based on suspect or witness psychology
cards.summaryText: Use cognitive prompts and neutral phrasing to unlock detailed, reliable memories.
